title: Ericoides adenostomum
taxonomy: Ericoides adenostomum is classified as a member of the plant family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. This family comprises over 1,000 species of flowering plants, primarily found in temperate regions around the world. The genus Ericoides is a small group of flowering plants with a limited distribution. The classification of Ericoides adenostomum reflects its unique characteristics and relationships to other plant species within the Boraginaceae family.
